properties.description: Composite gallery thumbnail image displaying multiple photographs arranged in a grid, serving as a visual index/preview for the photo gallery section of the PHP web application
A photo gallery feature within the PHP web application that displays and manages uploaded images
PHP endpoint handling file uploads for the gallery application
The PHP-based web application serving public content including the image gallery
images.jpg resides within and represents the gallery section of the web app
The gallery section is a feature of the public-facing PHP web application
Gallery likely depends on upload.php for adding new images to the collection
